title: PR #27: make CI green (runner + test staleness)
prompt:
PR #27 CI: previous tasks added Bun setup and switched the test step to `bun vitest run` (+ made the integration harness spawn the server under Bun). That fixed the big `bun:`/tsx cluster; ubuntu failures dropped 36→25. This task finishes EVERYTHING remaining to get PR #27 CI green. It owns both the workflow/runner items and the test fixes now (the earlier runner task 6c5ff was interrupted/trashed before completing these). Base is the PR #27 branch; push and verify with `gh pr checks 27`.

=== PART A: runner/environment (still red; `bun vitest run` did NOT fix these) ===
Key fact: even with `bun vitest run`, vitest's worker pool still executes test modules under NODE on CI (stack traces show node:internal + Node.js v22), so `bun:` builtins can't load and vitest's rolldown needs a Node native binding.

A1) macOS job dies before any test: `Cannot find native binding @rolldown/binding-darwin-arm64` — npm optional-dependency bug (#4828): `npm ci` skips the platform binding. Fix in the workflow dependency-install step: either install deps with `bun install` on the runner, or explicitly (re)install the rolldown platform binding / clean-install so the darwin-arm64 (and linux) binding is present. Verify vitest starts on macos-latest.

A2) test/runtime/trpc/workspace-api.test.ts fails: `Cannot find package 'bun:sqlite'` (imported via src/db/index.ts → src/db/driver/sqlite-driver.ts) because the vitest Node worker can't load bun: builtins. Follow the EXISTING repo convention: bun-only tests live under test/bun/** and run via `bun test`, separate from vitest (see test/bun/db/sqlite-transaction.test.ts, and AGENTS.md notes that the sqlite driver / bun:sqlite can't be imported under vitest). Either (a) move/rewrite workspace-api.test.ts so it does not import the real bun:sqlite-backed db (mock src/db like other vitest tests do), or (b) relocate it to the `bun test` suite and ensure CI runs that suite too. Do NOT try to make vitest load bun:sqlite. If you add a `bun test` CI step, make it run on both ubuntu and macos.

=== PART B: test staleness / real regressions (triage each: update test if source change is intended, else fix source) ===
B1) test/runtime/config/runtime-config.test.ts — 9 failures: config dir moved `.cline/kanban/config.json` → `.kanban/kanban/config.json` (intended, data-consolidation into .kanban) and agent-selection expectations changed (expects `pi`, gets `claude`/`codex`). Update test paths to `.kanban` and the current agent-selection behavior; confirm the auto-select default is correct, not a regression.
B2) test/runtime/terminal/agent-registry.test.ts — 3 failures: new `qoder` agent added → id list now [claude, codex, pi, droid, kiro, qoder] and isBinaryAvailableOnPath called 9x not 8x. Update expected lists/counts.
B3) test/integration/committed-providers.integration.test.ts — provider.baseUrl null instead of https://api.openai.test/v1. Investigate migration dropping baseUrl (real bug) vs stale fixture.
B4) test/runtime/unified-proxy/network-bridge.test.ts — 4 failures: bridge.port is 0 (expected >0), ECONNREFUSED 127.0.0.1:80. Port read before listen resolves? Fix real bug or test assumption.
B5) test/integration/task-worktree.integration.test.ts — 2 failures: trashed-task patch not written; restored.warning undefined. Investigate trashed-task-patch behavior on this branch.
B6) test/runtime/trpc/runtime-api.test.ts — "returns cline provider catalog": expected provider id missing from catalog. Per-agent catalog keying staleness; update or fix.
B7) test/runtime/terminal/agent-session-adapters.test.ts — expects <home>/.kanban/hooks/claude/settings.json, file absent (ENOENT). Find where settings are written now; update/fix.
B8) test/integration/runtime-state-stream.integration.test.ts — 2 failures: "preserves existing task worktree when base ref advances" (baseCommit mismatch); "moves stale completed review cards to trash on shutdown" (card not moved). Real behavior change vs test assumption?
B9) test/integration/task-command-exit.integration.test.ts — 2 failures: "opens only for launch invocations" (didExit false); "treats create-time reasoning inherit as no explicit override" (exitCode 2). Investigate.
B10) test/workspace/workspace-fs-api.test.ts — intermittent unhandled EPIPE at src/workspace/workspace-fs-api.ts:429 (child.stdin.write after stdin closed, runCheckIgnore). Guard the write against EPIPE / closed stream (robustness fix).

Approach: smallest correct change per item; run the affected specs locally (`bun vitest run <file>`, and `bun test` for any relocated bun-only spec) in the worktree; push; iterate with `gh pr checks 27` until the Test job is green on BOTH ubuntu-latest and macos-latest. Follow AGENTS.md conventions (no any, logging facade, existing test patterns).
